name: Nomad Coffee Bar
summary: Minimalist specialty espresso bar in El Born from one of Barcelona's best-known roasters.
whyItMatters: A top-quality coffee stop for central Barcelona wandering, especially if the itinerary includes the Gothic Quarter, El Born, or old-city walks.
pros: Official Nomad page describes this as its emblematic central coffee bar
Official page lists weekday hours to 19:00
European Coffee Trip flags Nomad Coffee Lab as a 2024 winner in Barcelona
cons: Official page lists Saturday closed for the Coffee Bar; Sunday hours are not shown
Not the closest good option for Montjuic race viewing

logistics.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 08:00-19:00; Saturday closed; Sunday not listed on Nomad page accessed 2026-06-22
logistics.distance_from_base: Barcelona base; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not close to Montjuic; use for old-city time rather than race approach
logistics.transit: Central El Born; walk/metro depending on lodging
logistics.road_closure_notes: No specific closure source checked for this cafe

timing.best_visit_window: Weekday morning or afternoon while in El Born/Gothic Quarter
timing.race_day_risk: Medium if race weekend timing conflicts with limited Saturday/Sunday hours

sources.title: Nomad Coffee Barcelona locations page
sources.note: Supports Coffee Bar address, hours, and description as the emblematic Passatge Sert location.
